title: RED CROSS DISASTER SERVICES - 211info
text: SOUTHWEST OREGON CHAPTER RED CROSS DISASTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides disaster services focused on meeting people's immediate needs resulting from disasters, such as shelter, food, health, and mental health services. 72B Centennial Loop Suite 200 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm, 24 hours per day / 7 days per week during an emergency Email (888) 680-1455 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (888) 680-1455 Disaster Response Main phone (503) 284-1234 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton, Coos, Curry, Douglas, Jackson, Josephine, Klamath, Lake, Lane, and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Services: Disaster Related Clothing/Emergency Supplies Disaster Related Shelter Services Disaster Relief/Recovery Organizations General Disaster Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH AND SAFETY COURSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTHWEST OREGON CHAPTER
